expected_signals.summary: vLLM published version 0.23.0 with major updates across DeepSeek-V4, Model Runner V2, Rust frontend, parsers, KV offloading, and new model support.
Model Runner V2 became the default for additional dense model families.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: expanded to Llama and Mistral dense models by default

expected_signals.summary: The release adds SSL/TLS transport encryption and hardening for untrusted input.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: SSL/TLS transport encryption and untrusted-input hardening

notes: The default expansion of Model Runner V2 is a key strategy signal. No runnable verifier: this is a static document-labeling task; the anchor quotes are the observable evidence.
